ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "forecaster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecaster */,
  "biden_seats" INTEGER /* Number of electoral college seats predicted for Biden */,
  "trump_seats" INTEGER /* Number of electoral college seats predicted for Trump */,
  "toss_up_seats" INTEGER /* Number of toss-up seats */,
  "predicted_winner" TEXT /* Predicted winner based on the forecaster's model */,
  "biden_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of predicted wins for Biden */,
  "trump_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of predicted wins for Trump */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was made */,
  "state_predictions" TEXT /* JSON column to store detailed state-wise predictions */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasters" (
  "forecaster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecaster */,
  "forecaster_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecaster */,
  "forecaster_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecaster */,
  "forecaster_website" TEXT /* Website of the forecaster */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the forecaster was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the forecaster's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "electoral_votes" INTEGER /* Number of electoral votes for the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing election_forecasts.forecast_id */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing states.state_id */,
  "biden_votes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of electoral votes for Biden in the state */,
  "trump_votes" INTEGER /* Predicted number of electoral votes for Trump in the state */,
  "toss_up" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the state is a toss-up */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, forecaster, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
